description:
Add the hex-required `description:` to `project/0` and a `package:` block to `mix.exs`.

Required for publish to succeed:
- `description:` — one-sentence summary (e.g. "Mutation testing for Elixir — mutates a scope, runs cited tests per mutant, emits a JSON kill/survive report.").
- `package:` with `licenses:` (see B2), `links:` (`%{"GitHub" => "https://github.com/autom8things/mutagen_ex"}`), `maintainers:`.

Note: `files:` whitelist is intentionally NOT here — it's a hygiene concern handled in the hygiene epic.

Acceptance: `mix hex.build` lists the metadata; no "missing description" error.
title: Add description + package metadata to mix.exs
